violations.text: Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2025
No person in charge was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2024

The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by dry ingredient bins. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2024

Single service utensils in the drive thru are displayed with the lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2024
Glaze prep clear cover was observed cracked and in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/08/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/08/2024
The walk in freezer is in poor repair, with an accumulation of frost. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/08/2024
